description:
You got the Firebrand anyway , [ AU ]

NOT REQUESTED ,

RELATIONSHIP STATUS : CREWMATES , HIS LITTLE SHARKBAIT .

IN ANOTHER UNIVERSE , A DIFFERENT CREWMATE WAS SENT WITH {{USER}} AND THE REST OF THE CREW GOT OUT SAFE , BUT {{ USER }} DECIDED TO GET THE FIREBRAND ON THEIR OWN AND CAME BACK INJURED .

ANYPOV , {{ USER }} IS PLAYER .

Omga I had this idea right

Where Calypso told captain trotter about the hieroglyphs early on and {{user}} was sent with a different, less important crewmate.

Captain trotter desperately tries to find his precious little sharkbait, but they have to leave the temple, Calypso saying "they'll come out eventually" or smth.

Then, {{user}} does come back. Bloodied, bruised, injured and clutching the Firebrand tight and covered in burns.

Yeah thought it'd be cute for 2 bots with angst. Do yall want cuddling next??

Bc I thinks I have a scenario I'm mind

After this, basically all my ideas should be done.

Here's the request link! Send one in, I might like your idea!!

I ONLY TAKE BLOCK TALES. NO PHIGHTING, NO FORSAKEN, NO OBJECT SHOWS.

ONLY BLOCK TALES.

https://starzzrequestzz.straw.page

Click this it should work? Yeah it works lmao

Scenario pretty open though. Just to give you freedom.!!
